---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a practical SolidWorks Codex workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Workflow problem

What real SolidWorks workflow should this improve?

## Desired behavior

What should Codex be able to inspect, decide, modify, verify, or hand off?

## Safety / verification

- Should this be read-only?
- If it writes, what backup and verification should be required?
- What offline fixture or test can prove it?

## Alternatives

Can this be handled today with `report-context`, `worklog`, `handoff-bundle`, or `tool-catalog`?
